overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a cowboy character leading a saddled horse through rolling grasslands with mountain ranges in the background. The character walks along a dirt path and navigates around a tree where the horse briefly rears, before continuing toward a forested area under a bright blue sky with scattered clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland meadow with distant mountain views

agents.ego_description: leading a saddled horse by the reins through tall grass, walking steadily toward the camera

notable_agents.action: dark brown horse with white patches walking calmly alongside the character

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain range forming the distant backdrop
low wooden fence running parallel to the path
small wooden structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide grassland meadow with a mountain range visible in the distance. The character leads a saddled horse through tall grass, with the camera orbiting around them. A wooden fence line and distant ranch building are visible to the left, while scattered oak trees dot the landscape under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt trail through grassland with isolated large tree

events.description: horse rears up suddenly when approaching a large tree, then settles

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path while leading the horse, maintaining grip on the reins as the horse spooks

notable_agents.action: horse rears up on hind legs near a tree, then returns to walking

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail cutting through the tall grass
tall solitary tree with spreading branches that causes the horse to spook

segments.scene_description: The character transitions onto a dirt path cutting through the grassland. As they approach a large cottonwood tree, the horse suddenly rears up in alarm at 28 seconds before settling. The wooden fence and ranch building fall behind as the mountains shift to the left side of the frame.

events.description: camera shifts to follow directly behind the character and horse

agents.ego_description: walking away from the camera leading the horse toward a forested area

notable_agents.action: horse following calmly behind the character with saddle bags visible

entered.detail: thick line of pine trees marking the edge of a forest

segments.scene_description: The camera shifts to a rear-follow perspective as the character walks away from the viewer, leading the horse through tall grass toward a dense forest edge. The dirt path is left behind as they traverse the open meadow, with the mountain range now visible to the left and the forest growing closer ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wide grassland meadow that gradually transitions toward the edge of a dense forest. It begins with the camera orbiting a character leading a saddled horse through tall grass, with a wooden fence and ranch building visible under the bright midday sun. As the character moves onto a dirt path, the horse suddenly rears up in alarm beside a large cottonwood tree while the ranch buildings fade into the distance and the mountains shift to the left of the frame. The scene then shifts to a rear-follow perspective as the character leaves the path behind to traverse the open meadow. Finally, the camera follows them away from the viewer, moving through the grass as the distant mountain range remains to the left and the forest grows closer ahead.
